name: dama-dev
description: Data pipeline and development dashboard for Dama

scripts.pipe2:download: python -m uv run python scripts/pipeline/pipeline.py --from-stage download --to-stage download
scripts.pipe2:identification: python -m uv run python scripts/pipeline/pipeline.py --from-stage identification --to-stage identification
scripts.pipe2:segmentation: python -m uv run python scripts/pipeline/pipeline.py --from-stage segmentation --to-stage segmentation
scripts.pipe2:linking: python -m uv run python scripts/pipeline/pipeline.py --from-stage linking --to-stage linking
scripts.pipe2:keys: python -m uv run python scripts/pipeline/pipeline.py --from-stage keys --to-stage keys
scripts.pipe2:names: python -m uv run python scripts/pipeline/pipeline.py --from-stage names --to-stage names
scripts.pipe2:cleaning: python -m uv run python scripts/pipeline/pipeline.py --from-stage cleaning --to-stage cleaning
scripts.pipe2:validation: python -m uv run python scripts/pipeline/pipeline.py --from-stage validation --to-stage validation
scripts.pipe2:tally: python -m uv run python scripts/pipeline/pipeline.py --from-stage tally --to-stage tally
